title: The Japan Magazine
additional-note: This is a Japanese publication. Its contents may still be copyrighted even without renewals or copyright notices, if they meet GATT copyright restoration requirements for works first published outside the US. However, by 1930 the magazine's masthead page offered subscriptions to foreign countries in US dollars, and listed US-based agents. (We have not seen whether this continued after war between the US and Japan began, though.)
